when_to_use: Ruby background job processing with Redis queues
Scheduled email digests with Sidekiq cron jobs
Automatic retry logic for flaky external API calls

pros: Pro and Enterprise tiers add power
review.verdict: The obvious choice for Ruby background jobs, though it's miscategorized — this isn't an API management product.
